text:
This PR adds a single new file with entirely new declarations. From the deprecation and backward-compatibility angle, there is nothing to flag: no existing public declaration is renamed, restated, removed, or weakened, and there is no Mathlib bump to compare statement strength across.

The substance concerns (`unipotent_radical_trivial : True` being vacuous, `ReductiveGroup.unipotentRadical_trivial'` being a trivial restatement) belong to the mathematical-correctness angle, not mine.

TAUCETI-VERDICT-d551dc9621d6566b9d34bf8a

```json
{
  "verdict": "approve",
  "summary": "Purely additive PR introducing a new file with new declarations; no existing public API is renamed, removed, or weakened, and there is no Mathlib bump. Nothing in the deprecation/backward-compatibility lane to flag.",
  "findings": []
}
```

verdict_obj.summary: Purely additive PR introducing a new file with new declarations; no existing public API is renamed, removed, or weakened, and there is no Mathlib bump. Nothing in the deprecation/backward-compatibility lane to flag.
